testcase.name: test_og_image_unsplash_200

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'unsplash' in 'https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_coop-dashboard-8/artifacts/o39a4kp9_charte%20graphique%20premium%20kdmlolo.png' + where 'https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_coop-dashboard-8/artifacts/o39a4kp9_charte%20graphique%20premium%20kdmlolo.png' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xffb5d597b5d0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xffb5d597b5d0> = 'https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_coop-dashboard-8/artifacts/o39a4kp9_CHARTE%20GRAPHIQUE%20PREMIUM%20KDMLOLO.png'.lower

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter7_sprint.py:301: in test_og_image_unsplash_200 assert "unsplash" in og_url.lower() E AssertionError: assert 'unsplash' in 'https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_coop-dashboard-8/artifacts/o39a4kp9_charte%20graphique%20premium%20kdmlolo.png' E + where 'https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_coop-dashboard-8/artifacts/o39a4kp9_charte%20graphique%20premium%20kdmlolo.png' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xffb5d597b5d0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xffb5d597b5d0> = 'https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_coop-dashboard-8/artifacts/o39a4kp9_CHARTE%20GRAPHIQUE%20PREMIUM%20KDMLOLO.png'.lower
